seoTitle: Tummaville vs Tungamull — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tummaville and Tungamull. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tummaville and Tungamull.
heading: Tummaville vs Tungamull — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tummaville, Queensland and Tungamull, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tungamull has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Tummaville (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tummaville or Tungamull safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tummaville has a flood risk score of 42/100, while Tungamull scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tummaville scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Tungamull scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tummaville or Tungamull?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tungamull has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.67% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
